prompt: Hole-card cue only: tap left hole card.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Left hole card is the hole-card anchor here because the exact blocker or showdown piece decides whether the pressure is backed by a real hand edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The left hole card is the right hand cue here because that exact blocker or showdown piece tells you whether the range pressure is real.
